title: Colax jugosus

parts: Colax jugosus is not a recognized scientific name for any plant species. However, I found a plant named Cola jugans or Cola nitida, and another plant named Cola gigantea, and Cola acuminata. side_effects: Colax jugosus is known to have side effects that include stomach upset, diarrhea, and nausea when taken in excess or by individuals with certain health conditions.
